---
title: "Joseph Paul"

image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/J-R-Paul

---

Hello, I am Joseph Paul, a PhD researcher in Economics at Heriot-Watt University. My research primarily focuses on the economics of algorithm and machine learning bias.

<!-- My research is princiappally focused on the economics of algorithm and machine learning bias. I am also interested in numerical methods generally and bayesian econometrics. -->
